created_date.description: The date and time when the security policy was created.

description.description: A brief explanation of what the security policy is used for.

id.description: The unique identifier of the security policy.

last_modified_date.description: The date and time when the security policy was last updated.

policy.description: The actual content or rules defined in the security policy.

policy_version.description: The version number of the security policy.
